name: Kok Lonsum
description: Final consonant form of Kok, representing the /k/ sound at the end of a syllable.

name: Lai Lonsum
description: Final consonant form of Lai, representing the /l/ sound at the end of a syllable.

name: Mit Lonsum
description: Final consonant form of Mit, representing the /m/ sound at the end of a syllable.

name: Pa Lonsum
description: Final consonant form of Pa, representing the /p/ sound at the end of a syllable.

name: Na Lonsum
description: Final consonant form of Na, representing the /n/ sound at the end of a syllable.

name: Til Lonsum
description: Final consonant form of Til, representing the /t/ sound at the end of a syllable.

name: Ngou Lonsum
description: Final consonant form of Ngou, representing the nasal /ŋ/ sound at the end of a syllable.

name: Ee Lonsum
description: Representing vowel offglide or final /i/ /o/ diphthong end (often transliterated as -u or -i).
